mapper.select: SELECT * FROM amz_fba_shipment ORDER BY sid, shipment_id, sku
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO amz_fba_shipment ( sid, username, shipment_id, shipment_name,shipment_status, msku, sku, quantity_shipped, init_quantity_shipped, quantity_received, quantity_shipped_local, declared_diff, gmt_create, gmt_modified ) VALUES
( #{e.sid}, #{e.username}, #{e.shipmentId}, #{e.shipmentName}, #{e.shipmentStatus}, #{e.msku}, #{e.sku}, #{e.quantityShipped}, #{e.initQuantityShipped}, #{e.quantityReceived}, #{e.quantityShippedLocal}, #{e.quantityShipped} - #{e.quantityReceived}, #{e.gmtCreate}, #{e.gmtModified} )

INSERT INTO amz_fba_shipment ( sid, username, shipment_id, shipment_name,shipment_status, msku, sku, quantity_shipped, init_quantity_shipped, quantity_received, quantity_shipped_local, declared_diff, gmt_create, gmt_modified ) VALUES
( #{e.sid}, #{e.username}, #{e.shipmentId}, #{e.shipmentName}, #{e.shipmentStatus}, #{e.msku}, #{e.sku}, #{e.quantityShipped}, #{e.initQuantityShipped}, #{e.quantityReceived}, #{e.quantityShippedLocal}, #{e.quantityShipped} - #{e.quantityReceived}, #{e.gmtCreate}, #{e.gmtModified} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE shipment_status = VALUES(shipment_status), username = VALUES(username), shipment_name = VALUES(shipment_name), msku = VALUES(msku), quantity_shipped = VALUES(quantity_shipped), init_quantity_shipped = VALUES(init_quantity_shipped), quantity_received = VALUES(quantity_received), quantity_shipped_local = VALUES(quantity_shipped_local), declared_diff = VALUES(declared_diff), gmt_modified = VALUES(gmt_modified)
